crashes.signature: EMPTY: no frame data available; EmptyMinidump

bug_analysis.root_cause: The function sanitizeTextFromClipboard was located outside of UrlbarUtils, leading to potential code organization issues.
bug_analysis.technical_details: sanitizeTextFromClipboard function was moved to UrlbarUtils to improve code modularity and maintainability. The change was reviewed and pushed to the firefox codebase.
bug_analysis.user_impact: No direct user-visible impact; this is a code refactoring to improve internal code quality.

common_patterns: Crashes related to memory allocation failures during garbage collection
OOM (Out Of Memory) conditions triggering crashes in the JavaScript engine nursery
Similar crash signatures involving failure to allocate memory chunks during GC
potential_root_causes: Insufficient memory or memory fragmentation causing allocation failures in the JS engine
Inefficient or buggy memory management during garbage collection cycles
High memory pressure or leaks leading to OOM scenarios during critical operations
relevant_fix_clues: Bug summary mentions 'OOM crash evicting the nursery' indicating GC memory allocation failure
No resolution status given, implying unresolved or ongoing investigation
Move of sanitizeTextFromClipboard to UrlbarUtils (Bug 2013000) may be related to memory handling improvements
similar_bugs_context.summary: These similar bugs suggest that the crashes stem from underlying issues in memory allocation and garbage collection within the JavaScript engine, particularly under conditions of high memory pressure or fragmentation. The recurring OOM failures during nursery evictions point to potential inefficiencies or bugs in the GC process. While these bugs are not marked as resolved, their common patterns highlight the need for improved memory management or fixes addressing allocation failures during GC cycles.

refined_analysis.root_cause: The sanitizeTextFromClipboard function is defined in browser/components/addressbar/utils.js instead of the centralized toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js module.
refined_analysis.technical_details: Move the sanitizeTextFromClipboard function from browser/components/addressbar/utils.js into toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js. Update all imports and references to import sanitizeTextFromClipboard from UrlbarUtils.js to maintain functionality.
refined_analysis.user_impact: No user-visible changes; internal code reorganization only.
refined_analysis.proposed_fix_approach: 1. Cut sanitizeTextFromClipboard function definition from browser/components/addressbar/utils.js. 2. Paste it into toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js. 3. Replace all imports and usage references to sanitizeTextFromClipboard in the codebase to import from UrlbarUtils.js instead of addressbar/utils.js. 4. Run tests to verify no regressions.
refined_analysis.optimized_context: Refactor sanitizeTextFromClipboard by moving it from browser/components/addressbar/utils.js to toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js. Update all imports accordingly to centralize clipboard sanitization logic within the Address Bar component.
refined_analysis.refinement_critique: The current analysis correctly identifies the core issue and affected files but is verbose and lacks precise artifact details such as exact function signatures or usage locations. It also misses a step-by-step implementation plan and does not sufficiently isolate the scope to maximize AI-readiness. There are no reproduction steps or symptoms, which is appropriate, but the improved description should be more concise and explicitly name the files and function involved. Adding exact import/update instructions or sample usage references would strengthen the directive.

filtered_context.concise_summary: Refactor sanitizeTextFromClipboard by moving its definition from browser/components/addressbar/utils.js to toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js. Update all imports and references to import sanitizeTextFromClipboard from UrlbarUtils.js to centralize clipboard sanitization logic for the Address Bar.
technical_constraints: Ensure all imports of sanitizeTextFromClipboard are updated to import from toolkit/components/urlbar/UrlbarUtils.js
Maintain existing functionality and pass existing tests after refactor
